name: debug-null-pointer
model_output: That panic looks like a null-pointer dereference. Check whether `cfg` is `Some` before unwrapping.

name: debug-borrow-error
model_output: The borrow checker is complaining because `vec` is borrowed mutably inside the loop. Clone it before the loop or refactor.

name: debug-stack-overflow
model_output: Your recursive function never hits a base case for `n == 0`. Add the base case or rewrite as an iterative loop.

name: debug-deadlock
model_output: Two threads are each holding a lock the other needs. Acquire both in the same order everywhere.
